title: Dumisani uYehova, osinik'izipho
lyrics:
1. Dumisani uYehova
Osinik'izipho zonke;
Dumisani emhlabeni
Nina nizidalwa nonke.
Dumisani zingelose
Ezihlala enyangweni;
Nonke nidumis'uYise
Nyana, Moya oyingCwele.
Amen.

title: Dumisan' uThixo wethu
lyrics:
1. DUMISAN' uThixo wethu,
Nonke nina enikhoyo;
Nimdumise ngamaculo,
Kuba enofefe Yena.

2. Dumisan'uThixo wethu,
OnguYise wezibele;
Dumisan' uThixo wethu,
OnguNyana umkhululi.

3. Dumisan' uThixo wethu,
OnguMoya oyiNgcwele;
Dumsani uYehova,
OnguThixo wethu yedwa.
Amen.

title: Ma bakudumis' abantu
lyrics:
1. Ma bakudumis' abantu,
Wena, Thixo, Bawo!
Ziya lawulwa iinto zonke
Nguwe,Thixo, Bawo.

2. Ma bakudumis' abantu,
Nyana, mukhululi!
Bazuziswa uxolelo
Ngawe, mukhululi.

3. Ma bakudumis' abantu,
Moya oyiNgcwele!
Wenza ngcwele amakholwa,
Wena uyingcwele.

4. Bubobakho ubukhulu,
Thixo wethu umnye;
Zizezakho into zonke,
Thixo wethu umnye.
Amen.

title: Dumisani uYehova
lyrics:
1. Dumisani uYehova
Ezulwini lonke;
Dumisani uYehova
Emhlabeni wonkhe.

2. Nina niziithunywa zaKhe,
Dumisani Yena;
Nani bemikhosi yakhe,
Dumisani Yena.

3. Wena langa, nawe nyanga,
Dumisani Yena;
Nani nina zinkwenkwezi,
Dumisani Yena.

4. Wena mlilo, nawe ngqele,
Dumisani Yena;
Wena ngqweqwe, Nawe nkun
Dumisani Yena.

5. Wena moya ogqumayo,
Mudumise Yena;
Nawe yenz' imvumo yakhe
Aph' uviwa khona.

6. Nina niziinkosi nonke,
Dumisani Yena;
Nani nina bantu nonke,
Dumisani Yena.

7. Nina nonke madodana,
Dumisani Yena;
Nani niziintombazana,
Dumisani Yena.

8. Nani bantu abadala,
Dumisani Yena;
Nani nizintsapho, nonke,
Dumisani Yena.
Amen.

title: Ndodumis' uThixo wami
lyrics:
1. NDODUMIS' uThixo wami,
Kuba elilifa lami
Ndiliphiwe nguYe.
Eli lifa ndolithanda,
Eli lifa ndolibamba,
Ndide ndize kuYe.

2. Phantsi kweli khaka lami,
Phantsi kweli themba lami,
Ndimi engabeni.
Kuba enguBawo wami,
Kuba engumhlobo wami,
Ndiba senyhwebeni.

3. Vuya, muphefumlo wami,
KuYehova "lifa lami,
Ngamaxefa onke.
Ulithande eli lifa,
Ulibambe eli lifa,

title: Nkosi ndiya kudumisa
lyrics:
1. NKOSI ndiya kudumisa,
Ngayo intliziyo yam;
Wena se undikhanyisa,
Bumke ubumfama bam.

2. Ndandise ndilahlekile
Kade, umphefumlo wam;
Ndandinge ndise ndifile,
Ndaya emlilweni nam.

3. Koko ubundikhangele,
Ukudungudela kwam,
Wandibiza ngobubele,
Ndize kuwe khaya lam!

4. Ma ndikudumise ngoko,
Bawo, mCholi, nkosi yam!
Wandigcina kwisihogo,
Waba ngumSindisi wam.
Amen.

title: Ma ndiyenze indumiso
lyrics:
2. Ndandihleli ezonweni,
Ndandibanjwe etyaleni,
Ndandisiya emlilweni;
Wandisindisa, mkhululi wam!

3. Wandivisa izwi laKho,
Wandidlis' ufefe lwakho,
Ndize ndibe ngumntwan' aKho;
Se ndibulela mKhululi wam!

4. Wandikhupha entsizini,
Wandibeka ebomini;
Se ndisinga ezulwini,
Ngofefe lwakho, mKhululi wam!
Amen.

title: Ndakumbong' uThixo wami
lyrics:
1. NDAKUMBONG' uThixo wami,
Kulo lonki' ixefa lami,
Endohlala ngalo;
Naxa se ndisekufeni,
Ndiza kumka elizweni,

2. Wandinik' ubomi bami;
Ewe, zonk' izinto zami
Ndizinikwe nguYe.
Kwa noYesu umSindisi,
Owabooni umphilisi,

3. Ngoko ndiya kumdumisa,
Ndide ndiye kumzukisa
Khona ezulwini;
Ndibe lapho ndibulela
Olo fefe ndalwamkela

title: Ma zith' iinggondo zethu
lyrics:
1. Ma zith' iingqondo zethu,
Zimbonge uYehova;
Kuba iinceba zakhe,
Zimi ngonaphakade.

2. Ma sithi kulo lonke,
Sazis' igama laKhe;
Kuba iinceba zakhe,
Zimi ngonaphakade.

3. Ngawo amandla akhe,
Ukhanyisel' ilizwe;
Kuba iinceba zakhe,
Zimi ngonaphakade.

4. Wondla izinto zonke,
Ngaso isandla sakhe;
Kuba iinceba zaKhe,
Zimi ngonaphakade.

5. Ezintsizini zethu,
Iliso liya bona;
Kuba iinceba zakhe,
Zimi ngonaphakade.

6. Kubo bonke oothixo,
Akukho onje ngaYe;
Kuba inceba zaKhe,
Zimi ngonaphakade.
Amen.

title: Bathandi benKosi, yizani
lyrics:
1. Bathandi benkosi, yizani,
Nazise olwenu uvuyo,
Ngomanyo lwentſolo vumani,
Endlwini yenkos' enikuyo.
Bangala abangamaziyo
Owethu uThixo omkhulu;
Vumani ngelingapheliyo,
Lusapho lwenkosi yezulu.

2. UThixo ohleli phezulu,
Epheth' ubukhos' emhlabeni,
Ethetha nolwandl' olukhulu,
Esithi kumaza "Zolani"
Ngowethu lo Thixo unjalo,
UBawo othando lukhulu;
Wothum' izithunywa kwa ngalo,
Ukuza kusisa phezulu.

3. Sobonana naYe ngobuso,
Kwelo zwe lingenas' isono,
Sosela kungekho ivuso,
Sisele umthombo wobomi.
Naxa singekayi phezulu,
Singe sinovuyo kwa futhi,

4. Usapho lofefe kwa lapha,
Luse lufumen' ingcwaliso;
Umfuno wezulu ulapha,
Uzuz' emhlaben' intlumiso.
Ma zom' inyembezi kwa ngawo,
Vumani kwandisw' amaculo,
Amen.
